options.name: -cell
options.description: the cell name for generating a wireload model

options.name: -cellLimit
options.description: the module size limit of cells or instances for generating a wireload model

options.name: -custom
options.description: generates the Synopsys custom wireload model format

options.name: -inst
options.description: the name of the hierarchical instance in a path for which to generate a wireload model

options.name: -instanceBased
options.description: generates wireload models for each instance in the design

options.name: -logarithmic
options.description: uses logarithmic average of the fanout value to calculate the wireload model

options.name: -name
options.description: renames the cell name or instance name

options.name: -netCoverRatio
options.description: the percentage of nets to be considered for generating wireload model

options.name: -noSmooth
options.description: suppresses the smoothing of the wireload models

options.name: -outfile
options.description: the filenames for the generated wireload models

options.name: -peakCap
options.description: uses peak fanout value to calculate the wireload model

options.name: -percent
options.description: the sample rate of the number of nets for calculation of wireload models

options.name: -scale
options.description: the scaling value used to multiply the results

options.name: -view
options.description: generates the wireload models for the specified analysis view
